artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent artists and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer whose work has earned him recognition within the electronic music scene. His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a sound that is both energetic and distinctive.

He has collaborated with several well-known figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer. These collaborations have helped to solidify his position as a notable producer in the Latin electronic music landscape.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering producers a glimpse into the tools and sounds that define his production process.

His work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving narrative of Latin electronic music.
